overall.description: Static elevated shot of a circular stone-walled classroom from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring gothic windows with heavy curtains, a central patterned rug, and magical artifacts. NPCs in wizarding attire periodically enter and move through the space while warm natural light streams through the tall windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular classroom with tiered seating and divination equipment

events.description: robed figure enters from bottom of frame and walks toward center
woman in dress enters from bottom and walks toward left side display case

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated camera observing the classroom from a fixed corner position

notable_agents.action: woman in tan dress standing near the glass display case examining items
robed figure walking across the central rug toward the back of the room

entered.detail: tall arched window with stone tracery and purple curtains allowing warm light to enter
tall arched window with heavy blue curtains partially drawn
large ornate circular rug with intricate patterns covering the center of the floor
curved rows of wooden desks and chairs arranged in a semicircle
curved rows of wooden desks with books and papers stacked on surfaces
tall glass cabinet containing various objects and artifacts
small wooden table with a glowing crystal ball on top

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a gothic-style circular classroom with stone walls and tall windows draped in purple and blue velvet. Warm morning light filters through the windows, illuminating the central patterned rug and semicircular rows of wooden desks. NPCs in period clothing enter the frame intermittently, with a woman in a tan dress moving to examine the left-side display case while another robed figure crosses the center of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static elevated perspective of a gothic circular classroom as the space becomes active with the movement of students. It begins with a wide view of the stone-walled room, where warm morning light filters through tall windows draped in purple and blue velvet to illuminate a central patterned rug and rows of wooden desks. As the scene unfolds, the stillness of the environment shifts as NPCs in period clothing intermittently enter the frame. The focus then expands to follow a woman in a tan dress moving toward a display case on the left, while another robed figure simultaneously crosses the center of the room.
